hypothesis.statement: No trustworthy Section 5 visibility baseline was captured because the read-only Plex Section 5 index query failed before any rows were returned.
hypothesis.evidence_level: high for Plex API reachability failure; none for true Section 5 index cardinality

recommendation.next_safe_action: Verify Plex Media Server is running and reachable from the Orchestrator context, then rerun this same read-only uncapped snapshot. Do not refresh, mutate, publish, or expand before a successful baseline is captured.
recommendation.reason: The current result is a Plex API reachability failure, not a Section 5 indexing baseline.
